spec.query:
from(bucket: "energia")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "variables_electricas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["id_inversor"] == "inv_1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "tension_pfv")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> drop(columns: ["id_inversor"])
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Tensión Paneles") 
  |> yield(name: "tension")

from(bucket: "energia")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "variables_electricas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["id_inversor"] == "inv_1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "potencia_ac")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> drop(columns: ["id_inversor"])
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Potencia Inversor") 
  |> yield(name: "potencia")

import "timezone"

option location = timezone.location(name: "America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires")

from(bucket: "energia")
  |> range(start: today())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "variables_electricas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "potencia_ac")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["id_inversor"] == "inv_1")
  |> integral(unit: 1h)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / 1000.0 }))
  |> yield(name: "energia_total_dia")

from(bucket: "energia")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "variables_electricas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["id_inversor"] == "inv_1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "tension_pfv")
  |> drop(columns: ["id_inversor"])  
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Tensión Paneles") 
  |> last()

from(bucket: "energia")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["id_inversor"] == "inv_1")

  |> drop(columns: ["id_inversor"])

spec.title: Energía Generada en los últimos 30 días

spec.query:
from(bucket: "energia_historica")
  |> range(start: -1mo) 
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "resumen_energia_diaria")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total_kwh")
  |> drop(columns: ["id_inversor"])
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Energía Generada")
  |> yield(name: "generacion_diaria")

from(bucket: "energia_historica")
  |> range(start: 0) 
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "resumen_energia_diaria")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total_kwh")
  |> sum()
  |> yield(name: "total_historico")

from(bucket: "energia_historica")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "config_precio")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "precio_kwh")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Precio kwh") 
  |> yield(name: "last")

import "array"

array.from(rows: [{
    _time: now(),
    _measurement: "variable_manual",
    _field: "precio_actual",
    _value: float(v: "${precio_energia}")
}])

from(bucket: "energia")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "variables_electricas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["id_inversor"] == "inv_1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "corriente_pfv")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> drop(columns: ["id_inversor"])
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Corriente Paneles")
  |> yield(name: "corriente")

precio_val = from(bucket: "energia_historica")
  |> range(start: -1y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "config_precio")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "precio_kwh")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0) 

from(bucket: "energia")
  |> range(start: today(), stop: now()) 
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "variables_electricas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "potencia_ac")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["id_inversor"] == "inv_1")
  |> integral(unit: 1h)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with 
      _value: (r._value / 1000.0) * precio_val._value 
    }))
  |> yield(name: "ahorro_diario")

import "date"

from(bucket: "energia_historica")
  |> range(start: date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1mo)) 
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "resumen_energia_diaria")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total_ahorro")
  |> sum()
  |> yield(name: "total_mes_actual_ahorro")

from(bucket: "energia_historica")
  |> range(start: 0, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "resumen_energia_diaria")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total_ahorro")
  |> sum()
  |> yield(name: "total_ahorrado")

import "date"

from(bucket: "energia_historica")
  |> range(start: date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1mo)) 
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "resumen_energia_diaria")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total_kwh")
  |> sum()
  |> yield(name: "total_mes_actual")

import "array"
import "join"

// 1. Get the actual data
actual_data = from(bucket: "energia")

  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "variables_electricas")
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

  |> count()
  |> group()

// 2. Create a "dummy" row with the same schema to prevent "empty table" errors
dummy_data = array.from(rows: [{_field: "empty_placeholder", _value: 0}])

// 3. Union them: 'data' will now NEVER be truly empty
data = union(tables: [actual_data, dummy_data])

// 4. Reference list
expected = array.from(rows: [
    {_field: "potencia_ac"},
    {_field: "tension_ac"},
    {_field: "corriente_ac"},
    {_field: "tension_pfv"},
    {_field: "corriente_pfv"},
    {_field: "potencia_pfv"},
    {_field: "tension_bus"},
    {_field: "corriente_bus"},
    {_field: "potencia_bus"},
    {_field: "factor_potencia"}
])

// 5. Join (this will now work even if actual_data was empty)
join.left(
    left: expected,
    right: data,
    on: (l, r) => l._field == r._field,
    as: (l, r) => ({
        field: l._field,
        has_data: if exists r._value then 1 else 0
    })
)

from(bucket: "energia")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "variables_electricas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["id_inversor"] == "inv_1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "potencia_pfv")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

  |> yield(name: "potencia")
